description_long: This is a modern, matte-black motorcycle with a low-slung, muscular profile and a streamlined design. The bike features a large, rounded fuel tank, a single contoured seat, and dual exhaust pipes on the right side. The wheels are alloy with a multi-spoke pattern, and the front is equipped with a prominent disc brake and telescopic fork suspension. Rearview mirrors are mounted on both sides of the handlebars, and the rear includes a red tail light and small turn indicators. The overall build suggests a cruiser or power cruiser style, designed for both urban commuting and longer rides.
description: A matte-black, low-profile cruiser motorcycle with alloy wheels, dual exhausts, and a contoured single seat.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the wide rear tire, red tail light, and dual exhaust pipes on the right.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the dual exhausts, contoured seat, and muscular fuel tank.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the headlight, front fender, telescopic forks, and handlebar mirrors.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the clean lines of the frame, alloy wheels, and the absence of exhaust pipes on this side.
